name: Shoo-Fly Cake (Old Lehigh County Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, brown sugar, and lard (or butter) in a bowl until crumbly.
2. Line a pie pan with the pastry.
3. Dissolve the soda in the hot water and mix with the molasses.
4. Pour the molasses mixture into the pastry-lined pan.
5. Sprinkle the crumbs evenly over the top of the molasses layer.
6. Bake at 350°F until firm.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
